publication/title: Imagine, Discover, Inspire: Proceedings of the 4th International Conference of the Trisomy 21 Research Society.
publication/authors: Flores-Aguilar L, Hamlett ED, Araya P, Barone E, Bhattacharyya A, Carmona-Iragui M, Chan L, Christian B, Costa ACS, Costanzo F, Del Hoyo Soriano L, Dierssen M, Eichler EE, Fisher E, Galbraith M, Ghosh S, Gimenez S, Guedj F, Guidi S, Iulita MF, Mobley W, Pelleri MC, Potier MC, Rabin KR, Rachubinski A, Rebillat AS, Rubenstein E, Saternos H, Sordo L, Strydom A, Valle-Tamayo N, Waugh KA, Yu E, Zeldich E, Busciglio J, Head E.

dataset/provenance:
* **Data Source Name**:
  * **DS Biobank Consortium**: The DSBC aggregates, preserves, and distributes biological samples collected from persons with DS and from individuals without DS (which serve as control specimens).
  * **ABC-DS Initiative**: The ABC-DS was formed in 2015 and developed into a multicenter, longitudinal study. It targets AD in persons with DS and includes analysis of clinical, cognitive, blood and CSF biomarkers, neuroimaging and neuropathology, and genetic modifiers.
  * **Horizon 21 DS Consortium**: The Horizon21 DS Consortium is formed by 10 European centers and is focused on obtaining essential clinical data on the progression of AD in DS, including in its early stages, as well as to develop a clinical trial-ready network.
  * **Project Prodigy**: Biovista Inc. has developed a new supervised Augmented Intelligence model (Project Prodigy) that integrates large amounts of clinical, preclinical and pharmacology/toxicology data to develop new hypotheses of disease etiology and repurpose small molecules.

* **Total Data Points**:
  * **DS Biobank Consortium**: Not enough information is available.
  * **ABC-DS Initiative**: Not enough information is available.
  * **Horizon 21 DS Consortium**: Not enough information is available.
  * **Project Prodigy**: 9,400 published papers in PubMed, 2,708 genes, 453 pathways, 18 post-translational modifications, 212 cell types, 374 drugs.

* **Previous Use**:
  * **DS Biobank Consortium**: Not enough information is available.
  * **ABC-DS Initiative**: Yes. Source: Handen et al., 2020.
  * **Horizon 21 DS Consortium**: Yes. Source: A. Strydom et al., 2018a, 2018b.
  * **Project Prodigy**: Yes. Source: Andronis et al., 2011; Persidis et al., 2004.
